candidates.text:
absolutely legendary post-mortem in the works for this one

that one gcp outage due to a flood in france will have nothing on this

production is down
ceo is in the channel
i'm in pajamas
ssh from phone
fix in 5 minutes

hero for today
villain tomorrow 
when they ask why it broke

#oncall #devops #startuplife
Web dev is similar, some days you're waiting forever and a half just for CI/CD pipelines to fail 🥱

this is why we have branch protection rules and DNS CNAME ownership checks in prod. learned it the hard way when a well-meaning intern redirected our API endpoint to staging and took down mobile apps for 2000 users

Then everything broke.

Two services fighting over the same port. A zombie process that wouldn't die. Gateway tokens that didn't match. Error messages that looked like a foreign language.

One single infrastructure bug took ~90 minutes and 15+ back-and-forth attempts with Claude to fix.
